item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 4min 𝗣𝗥𝗜𝗖𝗘 𝗦𝗜𝗟𝗘𝗡𝗖𝗘𝗦 𝗦𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗡𝗗𝗟𝗘𝗥
Gerwyn Price (100.9) survives a match dart on a 130 checkout fro
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 4min 𝗣𝗥𝗜𝗖𝗘 𝗦𝗜𝗟𝗘𝗡𝗖𝗘𝗦 𝗦𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗡𝗗𝗟𝗘𝗥
Gerwyn Price (100.9) survives a match dart on a 130 checkout from Martin Schindler (96.4) as he edges over the line and into the semi-finals to silence the Sindelfingen crowd 1 3 409

item.title: PDCEurope: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 4min The FINAL FOUR in Sindelfingen! Who’s going home with trophy tonight? 2 56

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 5min PRICE INTO THE LAST FOUR!
Agony for Martin Schindler!
The German fails to get over the l
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 5min PRICE INTO THE LAST FOUR!
Agony for Martin Schindler!
The German fails to get over the line in Sindelfingen, as Gerwyn Price wins 6-5 and advances to the semi-finals!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 10 6 53 3 mil
